title: 20 Exceptional Days with Steenbok Safaris
text: Excellent organization of our stay in the different national parks of Botswana. The guide and manager of Steenbok Safaris is absolutely recommended for your next trip. He was accompanied by the TT cook who excels in preparing menus on wood fire.

placeInfo.name: Steenbok Safari
placeInfo.locationString: Kasane, Chobe National Park, North-West District
placeInfo.address: Kasane Plateau Plot 2953 Moporota Street, Kasane, Chobe National Park Botswana

title: Last day ruined our wonderful experiences in Kenya
text: Our safari with Steenbok Safaris started well thanks to our excellent driver Reheem, but the last day was very disappointing. Promised activities were cancelled, and we were left stranded at a shopping mall by another driver for over two hours with all our luggage in the vehicle. Only after police intervention did the replacement driver return, leaving us stressed and unsettled before our flight.

placeInfo.name: Steenbok Safari
placeInfo.locationString: Kasane, Chobe National Park, North-West District

title: An amazing Safari to remember!
text:
The whole day went super smoothly, e everything was well organized, from crossing borders, to blankets for the cold morning, to meals and snacks.
We loved the Safari on both land and river, where we could see crocodiles and hippos very close by! 
We travelled with our small kids, 8 and 5 years old and they will definetely remember this trip for the rest of their life!

title: On wonderful day in Chobe National Park
text: Second time in Chobe National Park with Moabi and it was just as wonderful as the first time! We saw four of the big five, many birds and antelopes. Overall a very enjoyable day with one of the best guide we have ever had.
